zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Umfraville於大約1171年出生在英國諾圖波藍德卡素時，她的父親Odinel d'Umfraville II47歲，母親Aveline Lucy52歲。她於大約1197年與Walter FitzGilbert在英國諾圖波藍德艾頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1235年在英國諾圖波藍德波拉姆享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma Umfraville于大约1171年出生在英国諾圖波藍德卡素时，她的父亲Odinel d'Umfraville II47岁，母亲Aveline Lucy52岁。她于大约1197年与Walter FitzGilbert在英国諾圖波藍德艾頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1235年在英国諾圖波藍德波拉姆享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Umfraville was born about 1171, in Castle, Northumberland, England, her father, Odinel d'Umfraville II, was 47 and her mother, Aveline Lucy, was 52. She married Walter FitzGilbert about 1197, in Aydon, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died about 1235, in Bolam, Northumberland, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma Umfraville est née environ 1171, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Odinel d'Umfraville II, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Aveline Lucy, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Walter FitzGilbert environ 1197, à Aydon, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1235, à Bolam, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma Umfraville um 1171 in Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Odinel d'Umfraville II 47 und ihre Mutter Aveline Lucy 52. Sie hat um 1197 in Aydon, Northumberland, England Walter FitzGilbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1235 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Bolam, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Umfraville è nata il circa 1171 nel Castle, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Odinel d'Umfraville II, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Aveline Lucy, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Walter FitzGilbert circa 1197, nel Aydon, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa 1235, nel Bolam, Northumberland, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Umfravilleが約1171年にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで生まれた時，父Odinel d'Umfraville IIは47歳，母Aveline Lucyは52歳であった。約1197年にイギリスノースウンバーランドエイドンでWalter FitzGilbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1235年にイギリスノースウンバーランドボラムで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Umfraville(이)가 대략 1171년 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Odinel d'Umfraville II(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aveline Lucy(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 대략 1197년 영국 노르스벌랜드 아이던에서 Walter FitzGilbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1235년 영국 노르스벌랜드 볼램에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Umfraville nasceu aproximadamente 1171, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Odinel d'Umfraville II, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Aveline Lucy, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter FitzGilbert aproximadamente 1197, em Aydon, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1235, em Bolam, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Umfraville родилась около 1171 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Odinel d'Umfraville II было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline Lucy, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter FitzGilbert около 1197 г. в местности аидон, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1235 г. в местности болэм, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

sm.about 1171–about 1235: e tusa o le 1171–e tusa o le 1235

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma Umfraville nació aproximadamente 1171, en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Odinel d'Umfraville II, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Aveline Lucy, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Walter FitzGilbert aproximadamente 1197, en Aydon, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1235, en Bolam, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
